name: GPR 91
note: Off-Meta BO6 AR (5.56 NATO, 714 RPM). Universelle Slots = BO6-Pool.

BARREL: CHF Barrel :: Makes neck damage the same as head | +39.6% Gun Kick | +19.9% Horiz. Recoil | +40% Vert. Recoil
FIRE MODS: Rapid Fire :: -12% Bullet Velocity | +12% Fire Rate | +20.2% Gun Kick | +30% Horiz. Recoil | +20% Vert. Recoil
Recoil Springs :: -10% Gun Kick | -10.1% Horiz. Recoil | -10% Vert. Recoil
MAGAZINE: Fast Mag I :: -7% ADS Time | -16% Reload | -6% Sprint to Fire
Extended Mag III :: +9% ADS Time | +28% Reload | +13% Sprint to Fire
Flip Mag :: -10.4% ADS Time | -24.7% Reload | -11.4% Sprint to Fire
MUZZLE: Ported Compensator :: -19.6% Gun Kick | -20% Vert. Recoil
Monolithic Suppressor :: +10.1% Range | +20% Bullet Velocity | +22.9% ADS Time
